text: Stdout is for MCP traffic, not logs. The one Program.cs line that keeps a C# MCP server on .NET 11 alive.
Claude Code 2.1.119: --from-pr now takes GitLab, Bitbucket, and GHE URLs. prUrlTemplate retires the github.com badge.
Three ways to schedule a Claude Code task that triages GitHub issues. /loop is the wrong one; Routines are right.
